Lyrics.text:
Miantso antsika ny Ray
Ho vavolombelony,
Ny Fanahy Masiny
No hitari-dalana

Lyrics.label: Refrain
Lyrics.text:
Aza l avinao ny antsony
Fa valio, Jeso dieny anio:
Inty aho, iraho aho,
Int y aho, iraho aho , Jeso

Andro mety izao,
Jesosy andeha to rio
Ireo ondry mania
Mila ny fahasoavany

Ho avy indray i Kristy,
Moa vonona ve ianao?
Moa efa nampandre
Ireo namanao ianao?
